name: Manuel, Sabel, and Ismael
Our Venerable Father Hypatius, Hegumen of Ruphenia
kontakia: (Tone 2) O blessed martyrs, because of your perfect faith in Christ,* you drank of the cup of sufferings with generous hearts.* You renounced the idols of Persia* and proclaimed your belief in the Holy Trinity.* O trinity of martyrs, intercede for us at all times.
